files.contentEquals: export const parsePort = (value: string) => { const port=Number(value); if (!Number.isInteger(port) || port < 1 || port > 65535) throw new Error('invalid port'); return port; };

checks.label: behavior-contract
argv: import { parsePort } from './src/value.ts'; let threw=false; try { parsePort('70000'); } catch { threw=true; } if (!threw || parsePort('8080')!==8080) process.exit(1);
